response.justification: The candidate has roughly 19 years of solid hands-on software development across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, which technically satisfies the experience minimum, but the profile is that of a strong senior/staff product engineer rather than a director-level AI strategist. There is only recent, light exposure to AI (MCP tooling and agentic-workflow infrastructure since 2025), no recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products, no advanced AI-related degree, and no evidence of the executive-level influence, customer advisory, or strategic platform vision this role centers on.
strengths: 19 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of an open-source geo-data platform used in production
Strong craftsmanship culture: TDD, open-source libraries, workshops, and conference talks
concerns: Minimal AI/ML depth — only recent tooling-level exposure, far from 'recognized expertise in AI'
No demonstrated director-level or strategic leadership; career has been senior IC product work
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no cloud/AI platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Seniority/scope mismatch for director-level strategy role
Long, broad engineering experience meeting the 15-year minimum
